message:
feat(connectors): deterministic file traversal order + timestamp mirroring

Sort session_files() / find_conversation_files() output in all four
connectors (clawdbot, copilot, pi_agent, vibe) so that scan results
are stable across filesystems and runs regardless of readdir order.
Without this, the same corpus can produce different dedup/ordering
depending on platform inode layout.

Also fix CopilotConnector to mirror started_at ↔ ended_at when only
one boundary is present, so timeline consumers always get a consistent
non-empty date range.

Each connector gets a dedicated `_returns_sorted_order` unit test
asserting the invariant. Copilot also gains a test verifying the
mirroring behavior when only createdAt is present.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
